issues: 103 orphan nodes have no edges (all function-level nodes except 6 are disconnected from parent files; many lib-level files like modals/, ui/, stores/, engine/ have no cross-file edges)
Self-referential edge: file:src/StatFilter.svelte -> file:src/StatFilter.svelte (type: related) — a node pointing to itself is semantically meaningless

Misleading edge: file:src/main.ts -> file:src/lib/ui/Stat.svelte (type: contains, label: 'indirect via App.svelte') — main.ts does not contain Stat.svelte; this is an indirect transitive relationship misrepresented as direct containment

Missing 'contains' edges for ~62 of 68 function nodes — parent file nodes exist but lack 'contains' edges to their child functions (only 6 function nodes have parent contains edges: getWeaponConditionalBoost, WAIndividualHit, WeaponArtRequirement, WeaponArt, WEAPON_ARTS, calcBaseMaxHP)

Duplicate target edges: file:src/LevelBar.svelte -> function:src/lib/constants/game.ts:calcBaseMaxHP appears twice (calls at line 2969-2973, depends_on at line 2993-2997) — redundant

Two edges missing 'weight' field: file:src/DmgTotalTooltip.svelte -> file:src/lib/ui/Badge.svelte (line 2951-2955) and file:src/EmotionalTracker.svelte -> file:src/lib/ui/Badge.svelte (line 2957-2961) — inconsistent with rest of graph

One resource-typed node has 'function:' ID prefix (function:src/data/weaponArts.ts:WEAPON_ARTS) — ID prefix contradicts actual node type 'resource'

Two pairs of nodes represent the same file with different types: file:src/lib/constants/storage.ts (type: file) AND config:src/lib/constants/storage.ts (type: config); file:src/lib/constants/thresholds.ts (type: file) AND config:src/lib/constants/thresholds.ts (type: config) — duplicate representations of the same file

All 178 nodes have 'complexity': 'moderate' — the merge script reported defaulting 180 complexity values to 'moderate' because they were null, so no real complexity differentiation exists in the graph

Missing import edges for 3 files referenced by other nodes but absent from graph: src/lib/utils.ts (imported by DidYouMean.svelte, Highlight.svelte, weaponConditionalBoosts.ts), src/lib/dmgTypes.ts (imported by DmgTotalTooltip.svelte), src/lib/store.ts (imported by EmotionalTracker.svelte, LevelBar.svelte) — target nodes don't exist in graph
